get.description: Recent house-level history for every greenhouse in one request — the batched seed the fleet-overview cards merge with the live WebSocket edge, instead of one telemetry query per (card, metric) (avoids an N+1 across fleet × metric). The trailing `window` is resolved per (greenhouse, metric) against its own latest stored (simulated) timestamp, so each card sparkline seeds with data the simulation clock has actually produced. Readings are server-downsampled (bucketed averages, ~a few dozen points per metric per greenhouse); the bucket width is chosen from the window, so there is no interval parameter. `metrics` optionally selects the comma-separated house-level metrics (default temperature, humidity, co2, par). The response `from`/`to` report the bounding span of the returned points. An unknown window or metric is rejected with 422.

200.description: Recent history for every greenhouse with data in the window.
